use_cases: Detecting mobile viewport width to enable responsive component behavior
Conditionally rendering mobile-optimized layouts or interactions
Providing device-type context for adaptive UI components
ai_summary: A lightweight React hook that uses the matchMedia API to detect if the viewport width is below the mobile breakpoint of 768px. It returns a boolean value and includes proper cleanup on unmount. Commonly used to conditionally apply mobile-specific styles, render different component variants, or enable responsive behavior throughout a shadcn/ui application.
